summary:
Absent deep tendon reflexes signify magnesium toxicity, necessitating urgent reversal with calcium gluconate due to its ability to antagonize magnesium’s neurologic and cardiac effects. Calcium gluconate is the cornerstone therapy for managing acute magnesium overdose presenting with central nervous system depression or impaired motor function.
